archetype.secondary: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast / Performance Pro (Operational, Focused)

spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode B: Control Room Grid)
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-xl for principal, rounded-lg for secondary

AdminCMS.description: Wrapper component managing the layout and state for isPrincipalAdmin.
AdminCMS.logic: Pass isPrincipalAdmin down to Sidebar and Header. Apply global CSS variables based on role.

AdminSidebar.description: Dynamic sidebar switching styles based on isPrincipalAdmin.
features: Expandable groups with smooth height transitions
User profile section pinned at bottom

AdminHeader.description: Top bar adapting its accent and borders based on admin role.
features: Notification bell with role-specific dot color
User info with avatar and role label

micro_interactions.hover: Scale up icons slightly (scale-110), fade in backgrounds (opacity-100)
micro_interactions.transitions: Use Framer Motion for sidebar collapse/expand, stagger children reveals (delay: 0.05 * index)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards against backgrounds. Active text requires 4.5:1 ratio minimum.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-item', data-testid='user-profile-button').

textures.description: Subtle Dark Noise Texture for Sidebar Background

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the components in `/app/frontend/src/components/`. Create files `AdminCMS.jsx`, `AdminSidebar.jsx`, and `AdminHeader.jsx`.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Apply conditional styling based on the `isPrincipalAdmin` boolean prop.
For the principal admin sidebar, use `#0A0A0A` base with amber accents and add the noise texture with a very low opacity (`opacity-5` to `opacity-10`).
For the secondary admin sidebar, use `#0f172a` base with teal accents.
Ensure all text is in French as requested.
Add `data-testid` to all clickable elements (links, buttons, toggles).
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions of the sidebar width and expandable groups.
